launch_inputs.ideal_profile: B2B software companies selling to enterprise operations, finance, security, or compliance teams and showing signs they need approval-aware research or audit workflows.
launch_inputs.market_scope: North America and Europe, growth-stage to public companies, with enough public evidence to compare fit and urgency honestly.
launch_inputs.ranking_rules: Rank candidates by workflow pain visibility, operator-governance fit, likely budget ownership, and evidence quality; downgrade weakly supported candidates.
